Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Izyria]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Izyria is a place Calder considers visiting to connect with his culture.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Izyria has great arenas.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — A package is being delivered to a gladiatorial arena in Izyria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Izyria is a place where food can be picked up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Izyria is in a state of chaos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Izyria was destabilized while under the command of Alagaeus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — Izyria is located in the north.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — The Izyrian ancestors built the arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Izyria is a location that can be reached via free delivery from an alchemist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Izyria is a location.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Izyria is a continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — People in Izyria see the moon while the Aurelian continent enjoys daylight.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Loreli is reported to have snuck off to Izyria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — There is an obscure sect in the jungles of northern Izyria that worships lumberjacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Izyria is a location that the Champion Twelve plans to travel back to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Izyria is a place where one could be Pirate King.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Izyria is a location containing Consultant chapter houses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Izyria is a location Loreli was traveling toward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — The Governess of Izyria has started to rebuild the Champion’s Guild.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
